learning_objectives.text: Define key concepts in urban health including urbanization, slums, healthy cities, and urban health indicators
Explain the relationship between urbanization patterns and health outcomes across different global contexts
Apply urban health frameworks to analyze health challenges in specific urban settings
Analyze urban health challenges using frameworks that integrate social, environmental, and health system factors
Evaluate healthy cities initiatives and their effectiveness in improving population health outcomes
Design evidence-based urban health interventions that address both proximate and underlying health determinants

key_topics.topic: Urban health challenges and risk factors
Slums and informal settlements health conditions
Urban planning and built environment approaches

case_studies.title: Slum Networking Program in Ahmedabad, India
Medellín Urban Acupuncture, Colombia
case_studies.focus: Integrated urban development in informal settlements

case_studies.title: Nairobi Urban Community Health Strategy, Kenya
